title: Elaborate class properties during signal phase instead of scope phase

features.name: class property with package-qualified type
features.description: Code should include a class with a property whose type is qualified from a different package using :: operator
features.snippet:
package P; typedef int T; endpackage

class C; P::T x; endclass

features.name: class property with forward-declared class type
features.description: Code should include a class with a property of a forward-declared class type, where the full class definition comes after the using class
